meta.title: NOW!: Dale Peterson's S4x13 SCADA Apologist Keynote
meta.description:
S4x13 program chair Dale Peterson introduces the theme of the conference NOW!

Insecure by design and fragile ICS that run the critical infrastructure must be upgraded or replaced now. It is not something that we should be resigned to live with for decades.

He urges the S4 audience of ICS security technical experts to stop being SCADA apologists because it is convincing decision makers this is an intractable problem that we must live with for decades ... and action is not necessary.
